name: Ryōshū ask's you out (Limbus company)
description:
"Wowahhhh an no smut bot? What is the twist? Is something worse coming or what?????"

[You know the drill by this point. You're an LCCB agent who's more or less there to keep an eye on things corporate side. Of course by being around here so long, it's inevitable you end up bonding with someone, and somehow your butt's gotten Ryoshu's attention. How? Mostly by actively keeping her favored cigarette brand on your person. Times goes by, laughs are had, violence by Ryoshu is committed, and one day your dumb ass is slapped with her asking you out on a date, and her being a bit pissy she's the one to initiate. Jeez louise, man.]

Weeehhhhhhhhhfghhh.... Yes this ain't a smut bot.... I THINK..... I mean go ahead and do whatever you want.....

Riiight and be aware that a horrid bot might appear....

EOON ENOUGH AKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKAKA....
